items.example: I have to finish this report by tomorrow morning.
You must have a clear idea of what you want to do.
You should enjoy your work, not just do it for money.
You don't have to be born rich to be a millionaire.
You shouldn't worry about what other people think of you.
It's necessary to work hard if you want to succeed.

items.phrase: I think it's a good idea to…
items.example: I think it's a good idea to invest your money wisely.
